title: scleria schiedeana
intro: Scleria schiedeana, also known as the Mexican sedge, is a type of rhizomatous perennial sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scleria schiedeana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although its use and preparation should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
